day name: Transfiguration of Our Lord Jesus Christ
troparia: (Tone 7) You were transfigured on the mount, O Christ God,* showing Your glory to Your disciples as much as they could bear.* Make Your eternal light shine* also on us who are sinners,* through the prayers of the Mother of God,* O Giver of Light, glory to You!
kontakia: (Tone 7) You were transfigured on the mount, O Christ God,* and Your disciples saw Your glory as much as they could;* that when they saw You crucified* they might know that You suffered willingly*, and might proclaim to the world* that You are truly the brightness of the Father.
specialDismissal: Who, for our salvation, was transfigured in glory on mount Tabor before His disciples and apostles,
